data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Data encryption is employed to secure information and transactions.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 and AES-256 are used for data encryption at transit and rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OTPs and device-based confirmation for additional security.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Measures in place to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and proprietary solutions for robust DDoS protection.

data.title: User Account Security
data.description: Various features to protect user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Account monitoring, anomaly detection, and frequent security updates.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Precise plans and teams to respond to security incidents quickly.
data.technical_spec: Regularly updated and tested incident response protocols.
